title: Modern 2BR Steps to Beach by HolyGuest

publicDescription.summary: Set on Trumpeldor Street just steps from the beach, this bright 2-bedroom apartment offers a relaxed and modern stay for up to 5 guests. With its sea view, private balcony, and fully renovated design, it’s the perfect spot to enjoy Tel Aviv’s coastal lifestyle in comfort and style.
publicDescription.space:
A bright, easygoing seaside home 🌊

Located on the 4th floor of a well-kept building, this freshly renovated apartment blends modern design with a relaxed coastal vibe. Natural light, sea breeze, and clean interiors set the tone for your stay.

Wake up, open the balcony doors, and enjoy the sea view right from your living space.

✨ Inside the apartment:
• 🌅 Private balcony with open sea view
• Spacious, light-filled living area
• 🛏️ 2 comfortable bedrooms for up to 5 guests
• 🚿 1 modern bathroom
• 🍳 Fully equipped kitchen with sleek finishes
• 🪞 Fresh, minimalist renovation throughout

📍 The location:
Right on Trumpeldor, you’re a few steps from the beach and surrounded by cafés, bakeries, and the best of Tel Aviv’s seaside energy.

🏢 Building:
• 4th floor
• Elevator in the building

🔐 Security:
• Miklat (secured shelter) available in the building

🌆 Good to know:
The area is central and lively, with the natural energy of the city and occasional urban noise.

💙 What makes it special:
• True sea view from the balcony
• Clean, modern, fully renovated feel
• Walkable beach lifestyle
• Perfect base for families or small groups

🚗 Parking:
No private parking. Several public parking solutions are available nearby within walking distance.
publicDescription.access:
Guests have full access to the apartment.

You’ll also have access to the HolyGuest app with curated local recommendations, digital guidebooks, and optional services like food delivery and Shabbat meals.
publicDescription.neighborhood: Trumpeldor is one of Tel Aviv’s most iconic beachside streets. You’re right between the sea and the city — meaning you can start your morning at the beach, grab coffee in a local café, and walk straight into the heart of Tel Aviv in minutes.
publicDescription.interactionWithGuests:
We’re here to make your stay smooth and enjoyable.

Our team is available daily via chat or email to help with anything you need — from local tips to restaurant bookings and assistance during your stay.
publicDescription.transit:
Everything is walkable:
• 🏖️ Beach just around the corner
• 🌿 Rothschild & Allenby within walking distance
• 🚲 Bike & scooter stations nearby
• 🚌 Easy access to public transport

No car needed — the city is at your feet.
publicDescription.notes:
We provide fresh linens, towels, and essential bath products.

Optional services such as early check-in, late check-out, mid-stay cleaning, baby equipment, or upgraded welcome packs are available on request and subject to availability.

Non-Israeli residents are exempt from VAT upon presentation of a valid passport and tourist visa at check-in. Otherwise, 18% VAT may apply.

title: Chic Apartment w/ Beach View by HolyGuest

publicDescription.summary: Located on the vibrant Trumpeldor Street in the Beach area, this modern 2-bedroom apartment offers a stylish stay for up to 5 guests. Perfect for families or small groups, the apartment features a sea view, 2 bathrooms, and a renovated interior for a comfortable and relaxing Tel Aviv experience.
publicDescription.space:
Welcome to your seaside escape in Tel Aviv 🌊

This beautifully renovated 2-bedroom apartment sits on the 2nd floor of a well-maintained building, offering stunning sea views and a fresh, modern design throughout.

✨ What you’ll enjoy:
• Bright living room with panoramic sea views
• 🛏️ 2 comfortable bedrooms for restful nights
• 🚿 2 full bathrooms – ideal for groups or families
• 🍽️ Fully equipped modern kitchen
• 🌅 Natural light all day long

📍 Location perks:
• Just steps from the beach
• Walking distance to cafés, restaurants & nightlife
• Close to the city’s most vibrant areas

🏢 Building details:
• 2nd floor apartment
• Elevator available

🔐 Security:
• Building includes a secured shelter (miklat)

🔊 Note on surroundings:
Being in a central beachfront location, you may experience some city noise, adding to the lively Tel Aviv vibe.

💙 What we love:
• Prime beachfront location
• Fully renovated & modern design
• Ideal layout for families or small groups
• Incredible sea view right from your window

🚗 Parking:
No private parking included, but several public parking options are available nearby within walking distance.
publicDescription.access:
Guests have access to the entire apartment.

You’ll also enjoy access to the HolyGuest app, offering local recommendations, guidebooks, and in-room services such as food delivery and Shabbat catering.
publicDescription.neighborhood: Trumpeldor Street places you right by the beach in one of Tel Aviv’s most sought-after locations. You’re steps away from the shoreline, and just minutes from vibrant streets filled with cafés, restaurants, and shops. The area blends relaxed beach vibes with city energy, making it perfect for both leisure and exploration.
publicDescription.interactionWithGuests:
We're here to make your Tel Aviv stay unforgettable.

Our team is available every day to assist you before, during, and after your stay. You can reach us via email or in-app chat.

We’re always happy to recommend the best restaurants, activities, and local spots so you can experience the city like a true insider ✨
publicDescription.transit:
Getting around is easy and convenient:

• 🚶 Walk to the beach in under a minute
• 🏙️ Stroll to central areas like Allenby and Rothschild
• 🚲 Bike/scooter rentals available nearby
• 🚌 Public transport easily accessible

Everything you need is within walking distance, making this an ideal base to explore Tel Aviv.
publicDescription.notes:
We provide fresh linens, towels, and essential bath products.

Upgraded welcome packs may be ordered prior to your arrival. Early check-in, late check-out, mid-stay cleaning, baby cribs, and high chairs may be available for an additional fee, upon request and subject to availability.

Non-Israeli residents are not required to pay VAT. However, a valid passport photo and tourist visa must be presented upon arrival. Failure to provide these documents may result in an 18% VAT charge.

title: Spacious 2BR Apt in Balfour with Mamad by HolyGuest

publicDescription.summary: Located on the vibrant Balfour Street in the Allenby/Rothschild neighborhood, this spacious 2.5-bedroom apartment offers a comfortable stay for up to 5 guests. Perfect for families or small groups, the apartment features 2 bathrooms, a secure Mamad, elevator access, and a bright living space for a relaxed city stay.
publicDescription.space:
Welcome to your Tel Aviv home — a bright, spacious apartment designed for comfort and easy living 🌿

📍 Address: Balfour 8B
🏢 Floor: 1st floor with elevator
📐 Size: 120 sqm

✨ Layout & Features
• 🛏️ 2.5 bedrooms – ideal for families or remote work
• 🛁 2 bathrooms – one with bathtub, one with shower
• 🛋️ Large living area filled with natural light
• 🍽️ Fully equipped kitchen for home meals
• 🌬️ Airy and comfortable throughout

🛡️ Security
• In-apartment Mamad (secured room)

💡 What we love about this home
• Generous space — rare in central Tel Aviv
• Prime central location near Rothschild Blvd
• Ideal for longer stays or families

📍 Nearby highlights
• Rothschild Boulevard – 3 min walk
• Beach – ~5 min walk
• Cafés, restaurants & nightlife all around

🚗 Parking
No private parking. Public parking lots available nearby within walking distance.
publicDescription.access:
Guests have full access to the entire apartment.

You’ll also enjoy access to the HolyGuest App, offering:
📍 Local recommendations
📖 City guidebooks
🍽️ Food delivery & Shabbat catering services

title: Bright 2BR Apartment Near Beach by HolyGuest

Perfect for families, couples, or business travelers, the apartment features a large private terrace, a secure Mamad, and a bright modern living space just steps from the beach.
publicDescription.space:
Welcome to your Tel Aviv getaway 🌴

This beautifully designed 2-bedroom apartment combines comfort, space, and an unbeatable location near the sea.

✨ Apartment Highlights
• 🛋️ Bright living room with natural light
• 🍽️ Fully equipped modern kitchen
• 🌿 Spacious 15 sqm private terrace – perfect for morning coffee or sunset drinks
• 🛏️ 2 comfortable bedrooms
• 🚿 2 full bathrooms – ideal for families or groups
• 🛡️ In-apartment Mamad (secured room)

📍 Property Details
• Address: Yona Hanavi 25, Tel Aviv
• Floor: 3rd floor
• Elevator
• Size: 80 sqm + 15 sqm terrace

💡 What we love about this listing
✔ Prime central location near the beach
✔ Outdoor terrace – rare in the area
✔ Functional layout with 2 bathrooms
✔ Secure Mamad for peace of mind

🌊 Just a short walk to the beach, cafés, and vibrant city life.

🚗 Parking
No private parking. Nearby public parking options available within walking distance.

🔊 Good to know
Being centrally located, you may occasionally experience city noise – part of the authentic Tel Aviv vibe.

Guests have full access to the entire apartment.
Plus, enjoy the HolyGuest App, your digital concierge with local tips and helpful guidebooks ✨📲

• Carmel Market

It’s a lively, central, and highly walkable area—perfect for experiencing the best of the city.

title: Contemporary 3BR Apt Near Geula Beach by HolyGuest

publicDescription.summary: Located on the vibrant Harav Kook Street in the sought-after Geula area, this modern 3-bedroom apartment offers a stylish stay for up to 7 guests. Perfect for families or small groups, the apartment features a sunny balcony, 2.5 bathrooms, and an in-unit secure room (Mamad) for extra comfort and peace of mind—all just steps from the beach and Carmel Market.
publicDescription.space:
Welcome to your Tel Aviv coastal home 🌊

Set at Harav Kook 33, this bright and thoughtfully designed 3BR apartment blends comfort and location perfectly. The building includes an elevator, making access smooth and easy.

✨ What you’ll enjoy:
• 🛏️ 3 comfortable bedrooms
• 🚿 2,5 bathrooms 
• 🌞 Private balcony for morning coffee or sunset wine
• 🛋️ Spacious living area with modern design touches
• 🛡️ In-apartment Mamad (secure room) for added peace of mind
• 🏢 Well-maintained residential building

Step outside and you’re moments from Geula Beach, a short stroll to Carmel Market, and minutes from the buzzing Allenby & Rothschild scene.

🚗 Parking: No private parking on-site. The closest public parking lots are within walking distance (approx. 5–7 minutes).

Being so central means you’ll enjoy the lively Tel Aviv atmosphere — city sounds included. We think it’s all part of the charm 😉
publicDescription.access:
Guests have full access to the entire apartment.
Plus, enjoy the HolyGuest App, your digital concierge with local tips and helpful guidebooks ✨📲
publicDescription.neighborhood:
Located near Geula, you’re in one of Tel Aviv’s most authentic and lively areas. Just a few minutes’ walk brings you to the beach for a morning swim or sunset stroll. Carmel Market is nearby for fresh produce, boutique shopping, and vibrant local flavors.

Allenby and Rothschild Boulevard are within easy reach, offering cafés, nightlife, and cultural spots. The area blends old Tel Aviv charm with modern city energy.
publicDescription.interactionWithGuests:
Our team is here to make your Tel Aviv trip truly unforgettable ✨🌴
💬📱 You can reach us anytime via email or the HolyGuest app.
We’re always happy to recommend the best local spots, book activities, and help with anything you might need!😊
publicDescription.transit:
The Allenby/Rothschild area is highly walkable.

• 🌊 3–5 min walk to the beach
• 🥙 5 min walk to Carmel Market
• ☕ Easy stroll to cafés and restaurants
• 🚍 Public transportation lines nearby on Allenby
• 🚲 Tel-O-Fun bike stations close by

You can explore most of central Tel Aviv by foot, bike, or short scooter ride.
publicDescription.notes:
✔️ We provide fresh linens, towels, and essential bath products for your comfort. 
🍼 Additional services such as early check-in, late check-out, and baby equipment rentals may be available upon request and for an additional fee.

🪪 Non-Israeli residents are not required to pay VAT; however, all guests must present a valid passport photo and tourist visa upon arrival. Failure to provide these documents may result in an 18% VAT charge.

address.full: Ha'Rav Kook Street 33, 6330272 Tel Aviv-Yafo, Israel
